name: Apney Hee Tou Hain
overview: The drama story is a mix of comedy and entertainment. A drama revolving around one of our society’s major issue – how deeply old traditions like Jahez can impact the dynamics of a family.

trailers.title: Apney Hee Tou Hain | Episode 01| Promo | Khalid Anam | Sohail Sameer | Maira Khan | Green TV
